quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive site (private lodges, pools, rates, about, FAQ, contact), mobile-friendly, Facebook integration
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: 2026-07-17: SMS dual-SIM blocked (Continuity AppleScript sent from wrong line, delivery failed) — user cannot send SMS right now. Pending user action; no SMS actually sent. No public email — hold until user can send manually or picks another channel.

sources.intro: A place where you can relax and enjoy. Budget friendly!
sources.notes: Budget-friendly private lodge/day resort with public and private pools, cottages, and 24/7 stay options. Rate card graphics on Facebook are low-res text overlays (OCR garbled) — site shows real photo + FB rate images with a disclaimer instead of invented numbers.
